feed.title: Memedroid
feed.subtitle: Trending memes from memedroid.com (no native feed; scraped from the server-rendered homepage).

entry.title: Up to 85% of the rapes in Britain go unreported.
entry.content: Up to 85% of the rapes in Britain go unreported.

entry.title: America isn't perfect, but it's the best out there
When you broke up but still miss them
About the only thing both sides can agree on
The main goal of American universities
Depends on the neighbor, but yeah
I'd take the wings off, convert the interior to an airBnB and charge my guests $10 for an 8 oz. bottle of water
Hold on to your hats, but her milk is white, too!
Socialism is just hate and envy
Context and alcohol make a difference
You have thrown it but you should have lit it on fire first
He either was talking in his sleep or he is a serial killer
Others: Dreams have meaning. My dreams:
entry.content: Others: Dreams have meaning. My dreams:

entry.title: Gonna learn one way or another
entry.content: Gonna learn one way or another

entry.title: You can if they are big enough and she's jumping
entry.content: You can if they are big enough and she's jumping

entry.title: One more rhuhepnol and that apes getting railed.
entry.content: One more rhuhepnol and that apes getting railed.

entry.title: Meeting your Roblox GF: Not kid
I tried fresh water but it was really red
Dear President Trump, for the love of God, PLEASE TELL DEMOCRATS THAT BREATHING IS ESSENTIAL!
A bit dated seeing that--thanks to massive corruption across the state--Pratt's already been eliminated from contention
Having spent most of my life in Los Angeles, I can attest to this
Not my post, not my wife, and I feel sorry for someone who chose a mate so poorly.
Men can make bad decisions, too. Just yesterday I logged onto 9Gag. Forgive, please!
Might work if you're named DiShondra or Zyaire
Expect Goofy Gotcha Questions and Hate Speech
And now it's in your head
Easy mode activated. Maybe the old ways were better
For some reason. Lots of mysterious mail in votes
If you can make fun of yourself, youre a good man.
Can you say "Hypocrisy?" I knew that you could.
Liberals have funny ideas of what "success" means
Whenever my wife accidentally makes a loud sound, I just automatically apologize these days.
Is this how James Newell Osterberg Jr. became Iggy Pop?
Building a local AI project. So far so good.
But when I do it I have to meet with the principal.
All Day I Dream About Slavs
We need a law that forces colleges and universities to disclose the average income the different degrees they offer provide compared to the student loans they are offering
Can't be close enough to very far away
The fastest mood change known to man
